Frequently Asked Questions

Common questions about using PolyX to trade on Polymarket.

What is PolyX?
PolyX is a Telegram trading bot for Polymarket that lets you buy and sell positions instantly, copy profitable wallets, and manage your portfolio directly from Telegram!
How does copy trading work?
PolyX allows you to follow profitable wallets and automatically replicate their trades. When the wallet enters or exits a position, PolyX executes the same trade for you based on your configured settings.
Do I keep control of my funds?
Yes. You fully control your funds and wallet. PolyX simply executes trades on your behalf when you place orders or enable copy trading. Your wallet can also be exported at any time, ensuring you always retain full control of your funds.
Are there fees for using PolyX?
Yes. PolyX charges a 1% fee on each transaction, both buys and sells. This supports the infrastructure that powers fast trade execution and copy trading through the bot.
How do I start using PolyX?
Open the PolyX Telegram bot and type /start. The bot will automatically generate a safe wallet for you. From there, simply deposit funds and you can begin trading or copying wallets. PolyX supports autobridging, allowing deposits from Polygon, Solana, Ethereum, and BNB.
Get started with PolyX!

Launch the PolyX Telegram bot, generate your wallet instantly, and start trading prediction markets today.
